## What kind of addition is this?

- [ ] New practice question (Domain 1 / 2 / 3 — circle one)
- [ ] New mock-exam question
- [ ] New topic-file section (specify which file)
- [ ] New cheat sheet entry
- [ ] New code example / worked walkthrough
- [ ] Case-study mini-block for a mock exam
- [ ] Other (describe)
